reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en el buffet. La comida parecía de la semana pasada y encima nos apagaron la luz mientras comíamos porque cerraban y 30 y eran y 20 🤦🏻‍♀️😒

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the buffet. The food seemed like it was from last week, and to top it off, they turned off the lights while we were eating because they were closing at 10:30 when it was 10:20 🤦🏻‍♀️😒
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtcXNlV1JREAE

reviews.comment:
UN DESASTRE, UN ROBO A MANO ARMADO. No tan solo no me solucionaron el problema por el que lo llevé si no que me dejaron el auto con problemas nuevos, nadie se hace cargo, nadie pide disculpas.
Son unos LADRONES.

(Translated by Google)
A DISASTER, AN ARMED ROBBERY. Not only did they not fix the problem I brought it in for, but they left my car with new problems. Nobody is taking responsibility, nobody is apologizing.
They are THIEVES.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQta05YdVJREAE
